1x1.description: The cable connects to the right and bottom edges.

1x2.description: The cable connects to the left, right, and bottom edges.

1x3.description: The cable connects the left and right edges.

2x1.description: The cable connects the top and bottom sides.

2x2.description: The cable reaches the top, bottom, and right sides.

2x3.description: The cable connects to the left, right, and bottom sides.

3x1.description: The cable connects to the top, left, and right sides.

3x2.description: The cable connects the top and left edges.

3x3.description: The cable connects to the top and right edges.
